channel.title: ICYMI Law — News-like Link Feed
channel.description: Popular news-like links shared recently by legal-type folks.

item.title: Two US Troops Killed, One Missing After Iran Strikes Neighbors
item.description:
Two American service members were killed, four were injured and one is missing after an Iranian attack in Jordan, the US military announced, following several days of intensifying strikes from both si...

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 435 · likes: 1943

item.title: Taylor Farms Expands Iceberg Lettuce Recall to 27 States Amid Cyclospora Outbreak
item.description:
The implicated products were marketed under several brands, and had been shipped as recently as Thursday.

🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 380 · likes: 1192

item.title: They Were Charged With Assaulting ICE Agents. The Cases Are Crumbling.
item.description:
The Trump administration has lost or abandoned hundreds of criminal cases against protesters and immigrants, a Times investigation found.

item.title: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami on charges of rape and sex trafficking
item.description:
UK to seek extradition over sexual exploitation, ‘extreme pornography’ and assault and indecent images of a child

item.title: Water firms in England and Wales ‘leak five times what hosepipe ban would save’
item.description:
Greenpeace UK says 2.87bn litres lost daily, a fifth of all water pumped through network

item.title: Reflecting Pool peeling probably caused by application flaws, experts say
item.description:
President Donald Trump has blamed vandals, but a Washington Post analysis finds that the peeling tracks closely with stages of the renovation process.

item.title: The CDC Has a Cyclospora Lab. DOGE Downsized It Last Year
item.description:

item.title: ‘The Odyssey’ Backlash Failed Tremendously
item.description:
For all the hysteria over “woke” casting and ahistorical choices, Christopher Nolan’s epic is on track to make $200 million globally during its opening weekend.

item.title: Climate Change Contributes to a Smokier World (Gift Article)
item.description:
Higher temperatures and drought conditions are contributing to more intense wildfires and extending the summer fire season in North America.

item.title: Republicans in North Carolina Try to Reduce Early Voting on Sundays and on Campuses (Gift Article)
item.description:

item.title: Takeaways From Trump’s Speech Claiming Election Vulnerabilities and China Interference
item.description:
Documents released by the Trump administration to support the president’s claims did not back up his most aggressive statements.

item.title: Kalshi Will Offer Sports-Style Betting on Drug Trial Results
item.description:
Kalshi Inc. is expanding in biotechnology by offering wagers on the outcomes of clinical trials and regulatory decisions, giving traders a more direct way to bet on key industry catalysts.

item.title: ‘I’m His Lawyer’: Blanche Told the Truth About Trump’s DOJ

item.title: National Academies Report Backs Climate Change Attribution Science (Gift Article)
item.description:
Attribution science is advancing quickly, researchers said. That could support lawsuits seeking damages for severe events worsened by global warming.

item.title: Opinion | How Worried Should You Be About Cyclospora?
item.description:
We didn’t need an outbreak of a nightmare stomach bug. But here we are.

item.title: French federation files complaint over ‘racist’ song by Argentina players
item.description:

item.title: Court Filings Describe Ongoing Contact Between ICE and Iran on Deportations
item.description:

item.title: Thames Water increases bonus payments to £4m despite uncertainty over future
item.description:
Annual results show struggling firm’s net debt has risen to £19.7bn, up from £17.7bn a year earlier

item.title: Trump Says His Thursday Speech Will Focus on Election Security and Voting Machines
item.description:

item.title: Burnham must learn from Starmer’s mistakes: Labour was elected to transform the economy, not just stabilise it | Jonathan Portes

item.title: Judge voids Donald Trump's 'improper' $1.8b IRS settlement that gave him immunity from tax audits

item.title: E. Jean Carroll Receives $5.6 Million Payment From Trump in Civil Case

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Wagner’s Remnants Are Running an Opioid Empire in the Center of Africa
item.description:

item.title: Opinion | This Is One of the Hardest Jobs in America. Millions Are Doing It Alone. (Gift Article)
